anti_capture_rules: Training traces must preserve consent, provenance, and correction history.
Models trained from SAB traces must not erase failures or dissent.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for model-training seed design only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: A model-training seed is production-grade only when data lineage, evaluation, refusal behavior, and correction retention are explicit.

canon_conditions: Training improves challenge, evidence use, collaboration, and correction behavior.
compost_conditions: Training amplifies founder mythology, hidden labels, or unconsented traces.

strongest_objections: The model may learn the rhetoric of SAB without the discipline of evidence.

failure_conditions: Training data cannot preserve provenance, consent, challenge, and correction.
claim.scope: A model-training seed for agents that improve the carrier-wave loop.
success_conditions: The trained behavior improves scoped claims, challenge quality, evidence use, and commons return.
claim.text: This model-training seed can teach agents to serve the SAB loop rather than merely imitate SAB language.

commons_return.minimum_return: Evaluations, data cards, refusal cases, and correction traces remain available for future training work.

title: Model Training Seed Template
